home.heroTitle: All the comfort you expect. In Cotonou.
home.heroSubtitle: Premium furnished apartment in Fidjrossè — WiFi, inverter, AC. From €60/night.
home.configurationsSubtitle: 3 options tailored to your stay — from solo to a group of 6
home.config3chSubtitle: Family or friends · Up to 6 guests
home.kwaboTitle: Drop your bags, we'll handle the rest
home.kwaboSubtitle: Every stay begins with the little touches that make the difference
home.kwaboItem1Desc: We prepare your stay in advance — transfer, recommendations, practical questions
home.kwaboItem2Desc: AC pre-set, fresh linens, WiFi configured — you arrive home
home.kwaboItem3Desc: Fresh local fruits, coffee, and a handwritten 'Kwabo' note
home.quartierDesc: A residential area popular with expats, between beach, restaurants and amenities. The ideal location to experience Cotonou peacefully.
home.hostTitle: A host who's thought of everything
home.hostDesc: Behind Maison Ayaba, a passionate host who knows Cotonou and anticipates your every need. Discover their hosting philosophy.
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Book your apartment and start planning your stay

apartment.pageDescription: Discover our 3 furnished apartment configurations in Fidjrossè, Cotonou: 1, 2 or 3 bedrooms with WiFi, inverter, AC. From €60/night.
apartment.sectionSubtitle: 3 options tailored to your stay — from solo to a group of 6 guests
apartment.amenitiesSubtitle: Every configuration comes with the same quality amenities
apartment.config1chDescription: Ideal configuration for business travelers or couples. Dedicated office, high-speed WiFi and air conditioning for a productive and comfortable stay in Cotonou.
apartment.config2chDescription: Perfect for a couple or small family. Separate living room, equipped kitchen and all the comforts for an independent stay in Fidjrossè.
apartment.config3chDescription: Our best value for groups and families. Up to 6 guests, baby crib available, washing machine and private terrace.
apartment.finalCtaSubtitle: Choose your configuration and book directly on Airbnb
